caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, a matching green t-shirt with white text that reads "I'VE NEVER SMIL", and black headphones sits in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. In the background, several framed photographs hang on a wall, and a white male mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands near clothing racks. Two logos are visible on screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red and white logo on the right that reads "BOSSY FLEX TOT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and shifting his facial expressions slightly while looking toward someone off-camera to his right. The background and equipment remain static, with only the man's slight movements and speech occurring across the frames.
